stem:
Louise Bennett (1919–2006), also known as “Miss Lou,” was an influential Jamaican poet and folklorist. Her innovative poems _______ the use of Jamaican Creole (a spoken language) in literature.

Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
explanation: The verb “popularized” flows directly into its object, “the use of Jamaican Creole,” so no punctuation belongs between them. A semicolon, comma, or colon inserted there would ungrammatically split the verb from its object.
